title: Named Roles on an MIA or WDA
alt: The named-person roles required on a UK manufacturing or wholesale licence

items.label: Qualified Person (QP)
items.desc: Certifies and releases each batch under EU GMP Annex 16

items.label: Responsible Person (RP)
items.desc: Owns Good Distribution Practice across the supply chain

items.label: Responsible Person (import)
items.desc: Assures QP certification before GB market entry

items.label: Head of Production
items.desc: Runs manufacturing, independent of quality control

items.label: Head of Quality Control
items.desc: Owns QC, separate from production duties
